status.description: ALERT when the total, transaction date, or vendor cannot be determined without guessing. Otherwise OK.

total.description: The final amount paid or charged, with exactly two decimal places, or null when unavailable.

date.description: The actual transaction, purchase, payment, sale, or check date formatted as MM/DD/YY, or null.

vendor.description: The person or business receiving payment. Never State of the Arc Electric.

category.description: The single allowed category that most closely fits the expense. This field must never be null.

description.description: A mandatory description of the purchase or payment. When the product is unclear, copy the visible receipt line item.

alert_message.description: Begins with *ALERT* when status is ALERT. Otherwise null.

total.description: Exact visible total text, exact arithmetic used, or an explanation that the total is unavailable.

date.description: Exact visible date text and its label, or an explanation that the correct date is unavailable.

vendor.description: Exact visible identifying text, or an explanation that the vendor is unavailable.
